import React from 'react'; export default function RosterPanel({ team, onClose }) { if (!team) return null; return (

{team.team_name}

League
{team.league}
Coaching Staff
{team.coach}

Active Roster ({team.roster_count})

{team.athletes.map((athlete, idx) => (
{idx + 1} {athlete}
))}
); }
